name: Can judge force AEO de-designation?
description: **Yes, if improper; sanctions follow.** NY precedent.[1]

acceptedAnswer.text: **Yes, if improper; sanctions follow.** NY precedent.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, judges compel de-designation if unjustified.** Sanctions for bad faith.[1] Key factors: In camera review. Sparing use mandate. Burden on designator. Meet/confer proof. Swift motion.
